common.copyright: © 2026 VeriVote Secure Systems. Democratic Integrity Guaranteed.

landing.title: Secure Votes
landing.description: VeriVote is a real-time online voting platform built for transparent, accessible elections — supporting multiple languages and enabling every eligible voter to participate in democracy.

verifiable.title: Transparent Vote Receipts
verifiable.desc: Every vote you cast creates a unique receipt document in the database, giving you confidence that your participation was registered — without exposing your specific choices to other voters.

immutable.title: Tamper-Resistant Records
immutable.desc: All election data lives in a structured, cloud-hosted database with organised access controls. Results are computed openly and stream to every connected device the moment they change.

access.title: Built for Everyone
access.desc: VeriVote supports English, Hindi, and Tamil with a fully responsive interface that works on any device — ensuring no voter is left behind regardless of language or location.

auth.title: Secure Vote
auth.subtitle: Enter your credentials to continue
auth.error: Invalid email or password. Use admin@a.com, voter1@v.com, or voter2@v.com with password "q".

dashboard.title: Active Elections
dashboard.subtitle: Cast your vote in ongoing democratic processes.

voting.error: Failed to cast vote. Please try again.
voting.selectCandidate: Select your preferred candidate for this position.

results.title: Platform Analytics
results.subtitle: Real-time overview of platform activity and democratic participation.

security.title: How VeriVote Protects Your Vote
security.subtitle: A transparent look at what we have built, how it works today, and where we are taking it.

encryption.title: Real-Time Transparency
encryption.desc: Election data and live vote tallies are stored in a cloud database and streamed to every connected device instantly. There is no hidden tallying process — results update openly as votes are cast, and anyone can view them the moment an election closes.

ledger.title: Unique Vote Receipts
ledger.desc: Every vote creates a unique receipt document in the database, structurally tied to the voter and the specific election. This ensures the same account cannot vote twice, and keeps participation records separate from the running tally for clear auditability.

identity.title: Role-Based Access Control
identity.desc: VeriVote enforces a strict separation between admin and voter roles. Only admins can create elections, change their status, or access management controls. Voters can cast ballots in active elections and view results once closed. Neither role can access the other's functions.

privacy.title: Open, Auditable Results
privacy.desc: When an election closes, the full breakdown — every position, every candidate, vote counts, and percentages — is immediately and publicly accessible to all users. There is no information asymmetry. What administrators see is exactly what every voter sees.

audit.title: Built for Production Trust
audit.desc: VeriVote is a fully functional prototype demonstrating the complete voting workflow. The production roadmap replaces the demo authentication layer with verified Firebase Authentication, enforces strict per-user database security rules, and moves vote submission to server-side Cloud Functions to eliminate any possibility of client-side manipulation. The architecture is already designed to accept these upgrades without restructuring the core application.

accessibility.readerEnabled: Screen reader enabled. Press space to navigate elements.
